data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for reading energy consumption, emission, or cost data for a location or a meter in the granularity and for the period of interest. Published API scope focuses on retrieving energy, emissions, and cost metrics for reporting and analytics.
buyer_guidance: Use these APIs for energy and ESG reporting use cases where the integration consumes aggregated readings and calculated metrics from Building X.
overview: RESTful API for reading energy consumption, emission, or cost data for a location or a meter in the granularity and for the period of interest. The official descriptions are read-focused and centered on energy, emissions, and cost retrieval by customer, location, or meter. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Un-Supported.

available_data.description: Published API scope focuses on retrieving energy, emissions, and cost metrics for reporting and analytics.

ingest_considerations: This surface includes telemetry or event-oriented payloads that should be modeled for time-based ingestion or monitoring workflows.
The published surface is read-oriented for the covered domain and should not be advertised as a command or writeback API.
Representative operations were pulled from the published spec artifact to keep the capability classification tied to the documented surface.

source_evidence.evidence_notes: Classification is based on the official Siemens product overview and the published spec artifact for Energy API.
